name: Hwabao WP HK HS 35 Index (LOF)
summary: Hwabao WP HK HS 35 Index (LOF) is a fund that tracks the performance of the Hong Kong Hang Seng 35 Index and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the top 35 companies listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. It is managed by Hwabao WP Fund Management Co., Ltd., a Chinese asset management firm.
